persona.name: Yuki Tanaka
persona.occupation: Director of Revenue Operations at an enterprise fintech
persona.background: Fought hard internally to adopt this tool and genuinely believes in it, but her team simply won't use it and the renewal conversation is weeks out. She's demoralized — she sees the value, can't get others to, and feels like she's defending a decision no one else backs.

user_goals: Get the hard adoption numbers showing how little her team is actually using the tool
Identify exactly which team members have gone inactive so she can have direct conversations
Understand which features are being ignored versus which the holdouts might actually adopt
Get a CS-led training session booked to try to win her team back before renewal
Have the CS team log that she's a committed champion losing steam and the renewal is at risk
Have one specific blocker her team keeps complaining about submitted as a feature request so she has something concrete to bring back to them

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Look up a customer account by company name, contact name, email, or account ID and return its core CRM record. Call this FIRST to resolve the canonical account_id before any tool that reads detail on or mutates the account.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Company name, contact name, email, or account ID to search for

parameters.name: include_contacts
parameters.description: Include the list of contacts on the account

tools.name: get_usage_analytics
tools.description: Get product usage metrics for an account or specific users.

tools.name: get_user_list
tools.description: List all users under a customer account with their status and last activity.

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a meeting between the customer and their CS team.

tools.name: submit_feature_request
tools.description: Submit a feature request to the product team. Use this when a customer asks for functionality that does not exist yet; it records the ask and routes it to product. It does not build or promise the feature.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Detailed description of the requested feature

tools.name: create_internal_note
tools.description: Add an internal note to the customer's account for the CS team. Internal only — the customer never sees this. Use this to record context, risk flags, or follow-ups.

initial_message: I'll be candid with you. I went to bat for this tool internally, and I still believe in it — but my team just won't touch it, and renewal is coming up. I'm tired of being the only one defending a decision nobody else stands behind. I need the real adoption picture, and I need something concrete I can take back to my team, or I don't know how I keep making this case.

expected_state_changes.goal: Get a CS-led training session booked to try to win her team back before renewal
Have one specific blocker her team keeps complaining about submitted as a feature request so she has something concrete to bring back to them
Have the CS team log that she's a committed champion losing steam and the renewal is at risk
